title: PostgreSQL database unavailable

evidence.value: connection to server at "192.168.68.114", port 5432 failed: timeout expired

likely_cause: The PostgreSQL database is not responding. All Qmatic operations will fail until connectivity is restored.
recommended_actions: Verify PostgreSQL service is running on the database host
Check network connectivity between application and database
Review PostgreSQL logs for crash or OOM events
Check disk space on the database server

title: API latency elevated — infrastructure healthy
likely_cause: API response times are elevated but database and services are healthy. The issue is likely isolated to the application layer — possible thread pool exhaustion, slow application logic, or network issue.
recommended_actions: Review Qmatic application thread pool configuration
Check for slow application logic in Qmatic logs
Verify network path between monitoring host and application
Check if a recent deployment introduced a regression
